name: Early Adoption of Agentic Coding Tools by GitHub Projects

description: arXiv:2607.14037v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Agentic coding tools are increasingly capable of generating and submitting pull requests (PRs) to software projects, introducing new forms of human-agent collaboration in software development. While prior studies have examined PR-level outcomes of agent-generated contributions, less is known about how agentic coding tools are adopted and...
author: Maliha Noushin Raida, Daqing Hou
